state.title: Review gate captures full merge diff including incoming-only files — should exclude non-conflicted incoming files
state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: capture-review-diff.sh captures the full merge diff (git diff HEAD) which includes incoming-only files from main that had no conflicts. The reviewer then scores findings in those incoming files, causing the review gate to fail on already-reviewed code. Expected behavior: during a merge (MERGE_HEAD exists), the diff should only include files where we resolved a conflict (changed on both sides), not files that auto-merged cleanly from main. The pre-commit-review-gate.sh already filters incoming-only files from its enforcement check, but capture-review-diff.sh does not apply the same filter when building the diff for the reviewer. Fix: capture-review-diff.sh should detect MERGE_HEAD and compute the diff as only conflict-resolved files (files changed on both branches relative to merge base), excluding clean incoming merges.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
